Actions.Text: REFERRED TO INVESTIGATIONS AND GOVERNMENT OPERATIONS

Title: Authorizes the town of Clinton to impose an occupancy tax
Summary: Authorizes the town of Clinton to impose a 3% occupancy tax upon persons occupying hotel or motel rooms in such town; provides for the repeal of such provisions upon expiration thereof.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the tax law, in relation to authorizing the town of Clinton to impose a occupancy tax; and providing for the repeal of such provisions upon expiration thereof
